implementation.primarySubject: feat(world): 让星图节点按内容生命运行
implementation.finalFixSubject: fix(world): 消除星图节点轨道重叠

baseline.finding: Eight semantic regions and fact links survived background removal, but representative node stars were visually absent and all links were static.

visualReview.normal: Representative node stars are visible around each region without labels overwhelming the whole map; the cinematic archipelago remains the depth and material layer.
visualReview.backgroundHidden: The focused technical region, four named node stars, region orbits, relation lines, inspector, timeline route and map controls remain visually and operationally distinct.

failuresAndCorrections: A fourth representative node reused the first of three offsets and intercepted natural pointer input; six unique deterministic tracks and a regression test fixed it.
The inspector hard-coded three entrances while the fact projection supplied four; it now renders areaNodes.length.
The first active-link probe used a descendant locator against SVG line elements; the corrected compound selector verified two changing links in the tech subgraph.
claimBoundary: C.6 proves the current Atlas semantic subgraph and ambient projection, not ten-minute stability or every region at every zoom.
Long recording, mobile/reduced contact sheets and resource cleanup across route migration remain C.10-C.13 work.
